{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kamba Nomen
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kamba Nomen]] is a short, dark-skinned [[Reader]] who lays curses for hire.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Kamba Nomen]] is a target who was assassinated by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
